title: Biotin
body_html:
Biotin (vitamin B7) is a water-soluble B vitamin.

Functions
  • cofactor for multiple carboxylation enzymes

Deficiency may be caused by excessive ingestion of raw eggs. Features of biotin deficiency include:
  • alopecia
  • dermatitis
